name: Ubiquiti UACC-LRE Long Range Ethernet Repeater, Indoor/Outdoor, 2 GbE RJ45 Ports, Receives PoE/PoE+, Passthrough PoE Output Up to 1 km Link Distances
shortName: Ubiquiti UACC-LRE Long Range Ethernet Repeater, Indoor/Outdoor, 2 GbE
description: Long-range outdoor ethernet repeater with PoE support for extending network connectivity up to 1 km distances.
